cases.text: AC just suddenly quit cooling — one day it was fine, next day straight hot air. We did have it recharged a couple months ago. No cold air at all now.
hey my a/c is blowing warm air, like its just pulling outside air in. nothing cold at all. can i bring it in?
AC still blows kinda cool but not cold like before. its alright when im driving but useless sitting at a stoplight, and on hot days it barely does anything. been slowly getting worse over the summer.
my ac just isnt cold enough anymore, been like this a few weeks. blows kind of cool but i have to crank the fan all the way up to feel it.
found a small puddle under the passenger side of my car, completely clear with no smell, feels just like plain water. dries up pretty quick. is that anything to worry about?
theres been a little water dripping under my car, looks like just plain water to me. probly nothing but figured id ask.
AC quit all of a sudden — blows straight hot air like its not even on. we just had it recharged back in may. can you figure out whats wrong with it?
my AC still blows a little cool but its gotten weaker little by little. fine on the highway but barely cool sitting at a red light. useless on really hot days
the fan in my car only blows on the highest setting, speeds 1 2 and 3 do nothing at all. AC air is cold when it does blow tho
every time i first turn the AC on theres a nasty musty smell like dirty gym socks from the vents. fades after a few min. doesnt do it with heat, only AC
passenger side vents blow warm but the driver side is ice cold, turning the passenger dial doesnt change anything. whats up with that
the vents in my car started making a weird noise whenever the fan is on. hard to describe over text
inside of my windshield keeps fogging up when it rains and the defroster barely clears it
yellow ABS light came on this morning right after I hit a big pothole. it stays on the whole time im driving now. brakes still feel normal when i press the pedal.
TCS light popped on right after the tire place put just one new tire on my car. is that a thing?
abs light came on in my wifes car, brakes seem fine tho. do we need an appointment right away?
theres a yellow light on my dash that looks like a little car with squiggly wavy lines under it?? no clue what it means
Airbag light popped on a few days ago right after a lil fender bender, no airbags went off. It just stays on steady the whole time I drive.
my SRS light is flashing some weird pattern of blinks ever since the battery died and i had to jump start the car. is that serious??
hey, the little airbag person light on my dash has been glowing for a couple weeks now, started after i pulled the seats out to shampoo the carpets
theres a yellow SRS triangle showing on my dash, no clue what that even means
My 4 wheel drive wont engage. When I push the button the 4WD light just flashes at me and I hear a grinding noise. Started a couple weeks ago right after I hit a nasty pothole.
Service 4WD message popped up this morning and stays on. Truck feels like its stuck in 4 wheel drive and binds up when I'm turning. Can you test the 4x4 system?
The AWD warning light came on a few days ago and now the car feels sluggish like somethings dragging it. Not sure whats going on with it.
hey somethings off with my four wheel drive, it doesnt really kick in anymore when i switch it into 4hi
car cranks super slow in the mornings when its cold out, had to jump it yesterday. only started a few days ago. can you test my battery?
Car sat in the garage for like 3 weeks while we were out of town. Want to make sure the battery is still good before I trust it again.
hi, my battery is getting pretty old and i just want it tested to see if it needs replaced soon. nothing wrong yet, just being cautious
Loud grinding noise like metal on metal every time I press the brake pedal, it sounds awful
Theres smoke coming off my rear right wheel. I think i mightve left the parking brake on when i drove home
brake pedal has felt really soft and mushy the last few days, I have to pump it a couple times before the car actually slows down
My brake pedal doesnt hold, it just slowly creeps down toward the floor while im pressing on it
the brake pedal is crazy stiff, feels like stepping on a rock. i pretty much have to stand on it to get the car to stop
car pulls hard to the left every time i hit the brakes, drives totally straight the rest of the time
Red BRAKE light came on and its staying on. Parking brake is all the way off, pedal feels mushy, and I noticed a wet spot under one wheel.
The brake warning light on my dash is glowing red. Emergency brake is definitely all the way off, so not sure whats going on.
The red brake light and the yellow ABS light both came on at the same time. Is it safe to keep driving to work??
hey my red brake light poped up on the dashboard, can someone take a look at it
Car wont turn over at all, just rapid clicking when I turn the key. Dash lights come on but they go real dim when I try. Jumped it and it fired right up. Totally out of nowhere, no warning.
Engine cranks super slow like rrr rrr rrr before it finally catches. Way worse when its cold outside. Headlights go real dim while its cranking too.
The red battery light is on in my dash and I can hear a squealing sound too. Is it ok to keep driving it?
Theres a loud whining noise coming from under the hood that goes up and down with the engine. Gets louder when I turn the headlights on too.
my headlights keep going dimmer and brighter on there own at night, its kinda freaky
something keeps draining my battery overnight. i jump it in the morning and by the next day its completely dead again. so annoying
Check engine light came on right after I filled up gas like 2 weeks ago, tightened the cap but its still on solid. Car drives fine otherwise
when i step on the gas theres like a second delay before the car actually goes. started suddenly out of nowhere
engine sputters and runs rough when im stopped at red lights, rpm needle bounces all over. check engine light is on and sometimes i get a rotten egg smell
puff of blue smoke out the tailpipe when i first start it in the morning, smells like burning oil. been adding a quart every few weeks too
car just dies on me when i come to a stop at lights, starts right back up tho. what would cause that??
my truck started blowing black smoke, not sure whats going on with it
Thick white smoke pouring out of my tailpipe even after driving 20 min, smells kinda sweet like syrup, and Ive been topping off the coolant. Started a few days ago.
Theres a bright green puddle under the front of my car right by the radiator, and it smells sweet like pancake syrup. Just noticed it today.
My heater just blows cold air no matter how long I drive, started a couple weeks ago. Also had to top off the coolant tank twice.
That red thermometer light with the waves is showing on my dash and the car feels like its running hotter than usual.
somethin smells like maple syrup around my car after i drive it, cant find any leak tho
Smoke coming out from under the hood and the temp gauge went all the way into the red, pulled over right away.
my radio is just dead, screen wont turn on and no sound at all. everything else in the car works fine
Sharp burning plastic smell coming from behind the dash, gets way worse when I turn the heater on. Started today. My dash lights have been flickering a little too.
somethings up with my cars electrical. one day the radio resets itself, next day the door locks click on their own, next day the gauges jump around. random stuff, always worse after it rains
theres this weird electrical buzzing sound in my car, kinda sounds like a beehive tbh
Loud rattle from under the car when its just sitting there idling, like a can full of rocks. quiets down once im at highway speed. started a couple days ago
theres an exhaust smell inside my car and its alot worse when the heater is running. been going on a couple weeks now, i get headaches driving to work
my engine makes a fast ticking noise when i first start it cold in the morning, goes away after it warms up a few minutes
the car got crazy loud all of a sudden, sounds like a motorcycle now. pretty sure the muffler rusted out
my car sounds way louder than it use to, this deep rumble. kinda embarrassing tbh
battery light came on then my headlights got super dim, whole dash went dark and the car shut off while i was driving. wont start back up, im stuck on the shoulder rn
my truck cranks for like 5-6 seconds first thing in the morning before it finally fires up. starts fine the rest of the day. been doing it a couple weeks now
if i stop for gas after driving awhile the car cranks and cranks but wont catch. i smell gas around the engine when it happens. starts fine after it sits for a bit
car sputtered for a sec and then just died on me going up the big hill on my way home. scared me pretty good
when i try to start my car all it does is click click click, wont turn over at all
black oily spot on my driveway where i park, feels all greasy when you touch it
Getting a greasy burning oil smell from under the hood after long drives. no drips on the ground that ive seen
been noticing kind of a burnt oil smell from my car lately
Theres gray smoke coming up from under the hood and it smells like burning oil
some kind of thick dark sticky fluid dripping under the back of my truck, way thicker than normal oil
Red oil light with the little drip icon just came on and stayed on. Pulled over right away, im stuck on the shoulder now. Engine is making a tapping sound too. Just had an oil change 2 weeks ago.
My oil pressure light keeps coming on and then going back off. Oil level on the dipstick looks fine tho.
Steering wheel went stiff overnight, really hard to crank in parking lots but fine on the highway. Also seeing red spots under the front of my car where I park.
EPS light came on right after they put a new battery in last week, it stays on the whole time and the steering wheel feels really heavy now.
Theres a whining noise whenever I turn the steering wheel, goes away as soon as the wheel is straight again.
theres a bad vibration in the steering wheel at 65 on the highway, calms down when i slow down. started right after i hit a big pothole
theres a loud clunk from the front driver side every time i go over a bump or pothole. been doing it for a couple weeks now
Got 4 new tires a couple weeks ago and ever since the car pulls to the left on the highway. Never did this before.
steering wheel feels super loose, i can wiggle it side to side a little before the car actually turns. seems worse on the highway
Theres a humming noise coming from up front that gets louder the faster I drive. My husband says it sounds like an airplane taking off
my steering wheel sits crooked, like tilted off to one side, even when im driving straight down the road. drives me crazy
my car only drifts on certain roads, on other roads it drives totally normal. so weird
found a screw sticking out of my rear left tire this morning. its still holding air and drives fine but want it checked before it gets worse
one of my front tires keeps going low, i have to put air in it like every week. cant see anything stuck in it
my low tire pressure warning came on so i put air in all 4 tires yesterday but the light still wont go off. tires look fine to me
the TPMS light is on in my car. been really cold here this week so maybe thats why? want to make sure its nothing serious
when i press the gas from a stop theres a delay for like a second before the car actually goes. been doing it for a few weeks now. check engine light is on solid. happens mostly in town driving
found a bright red puddle under the middle of my car this morning. steering feels totally normal, not hard to turn at all. can you figure out whats leaking?
car shudders pretty bad whenever i give it gas going uphill, smooths right out as soon as i let off. started a couple weeks ago
sitting at stoplights my rpms bounce up and down all on their own, my foot isnt even on the pedal. car kinda wants to lurch forward too
little hiccup right when i hit the gas taking off from a stop sign, then it catches up and drives fine
theres like 5 different warning lights showing in my car and i have no clue what any of them mean
my drivers side window is stuck halfway down and wont go back up. makes a horrible grinding noise when i hold the switch. started a couple days ago
passenger window quit working this morning. press the switch and nothing happens at all. can you figure out whats wrong with it?
both back windows stopped rolling down, the switches in the back dont do anything anymore. front ones still work fine
hi, my rear window wont go up all the way anymore
Wipers barely work when its raining, they squeak dragging across the glass and the passenger side one hardly moves at all. started a couple weeks ago
My windshield wipers totally quit working right after I went thru the car wash. They dont move at all now.
theres a nasty grinding noise from my wipers when i turn them on and they barely move across the windshield. been doing this for months
my windshield wipers are moving way slower than normal and sometimes stall halfway up the glass
Honestly not sure whats wrong. Its making a rattle over bumps, the heat smells funny, and the steering feels loose. Could be one thing or three, no idea
my car has like 3 problems at once, squeaks when i brake, hesitates when i give it gas, and something clunks in the back. dont even know what category to pick
Got rear ended last weekend. Bumper looks mostly fine but the car drives different now and i want it checked out before anything gets worse
hit a really bad pothole yesterday and now the front end feels off. no warning lights, just want someone to make sure nothing got bent
Just had my brakes done at another shop last week and now theres a grinding thats worse than before. would like a second opinion on their work
dealer replaced the alternator like 2 weeks ago and the battery light came right back on. super frustrating. can you check what they did
something feels seriously wrong with my car and I dont feel safe driving it anymore. im scared its going to break down with my kids in it
started making an awful noise on the highway so i pulled over, too scared to drive it any farther. should i just have it towed to you?
Nothing wrong that i know of, were driving to Florida next month and I just want a once over before the trip
just want a general checkup, its been over a year since anyone looked at the car. peace of mind mostly
My dads truck has been sitting in his garage for about two years. want to get it safe to drive again before i take it over
car sat outside all winter w/o being driven. not sure what it needs before i start using it again for work
hi
Good morning! hope you guys are having a good week over there
my car is broken
having some issues with the car, can somebody just give me a call when you get a chance
help
how much do u charge for an oil change and tire rotation?
what time are you open till on saturdays? and do i need an appointment or can i just show up
asdkfj qwoeiru 39482 mmm bbbb
hey are yall hiring any techs right now? my nephew just finished trade school and hes looking for work
quick question, do you guys offer loaner cars or a shuttle while my car is at the shop?
hi i need to reschedule my appt from friday to sometime next week, is tuesday morning open? thanks
do you know a good body shop around here for a paint job on my truck? figured you guys would know somebody
Brakes have been squeaking for a couple weeks and now the red BRAKE light just came on. My e-brake is all the way off.
The yellow ABS light popped on right after I smacked a big pothole. Brakes still stop the car fine.
Loud grinding sound from the front when I press the brakes. No warning lights on the dash or anything.
My Audi Q5 smells like maple syrup under the hood and the coolant tank keeps getting low.
Theres a dark brown puddle under the front of my car by the engine. I had an oil change done a couple weeks ago.
Bright green puddle under the front of my Honda and the low coolant warning keeps popping up on the dash.
The red oil can light flickers on when im sitting at a stoplight and goes off when I start moving again.
Blueish gray smoke puffs out the tailpipe when I take off from a light, and it smells like burning oil.
Three different warning lights all lit up at the same time this morning, no idea what any of them mean.
Car yanks to the left every time I hit the brakes but it drives perfectly straight the rest of the time.
It keeps drifting to the right on the freeway even when im not touching the brakes at all.
Tire pressure light keeps coming back on even tho I put air in all four tires last weekend.
Can you guys test my battery? Its like 5 years old and the car cranked real slow this morning.
Takes forever to fire up first thing in the morning after sitting overnight, I have to crank it 2 or 3 times. Battery tested fine at the parts store.
AC is blowing warm air again. Had it recharged last summer and it was ice cold for a few months, so I think the freon leaked out.
The AC still gets pretty cold but barely any air comes out of the vents, even with the fan on the highest setting.
